output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?restaurant ?country ?city ?chef WHERE {
  ?restaurant p:P1344 [ ps:P1344 "3" ; pq:P585 ?year ] .
  ?restaurant wdt:P17 ?country ; wdt:P131 ?city ; wdt:P176 ?chef .
  FILTER(SUBSTR(STR(?year) , 1 , 4) = "2015")
}
output.selections:
Using properties:
- located in the administrative territorial entity (wd:P131 as wdt), also known as "administrative territorial entity", "administrative territory", "city", "happens in", "in", etc.:
  - the item is located on the territory of the following ... the item falls only partially into the administrative entity
- participant in (wd:P1344 as p/ps), also known as "attended", "competed in", "competes in", "participant of", "participant of event", etc.:
  - event in which a person, organization or creative work was/is a participant; inverse of P710 or P1923
- country (wd:P17 as wdt), also known as "host country", "land", "sovereign state", "state":
  - sovereign state that this item is in (not to be used for human beings)
- manufacturer (wd:P176 as wdt), also known as "assembled by", "assembler", "brewed by", "brewer", "builder", etc.:
  - (main or final) manufacturer or producer of this product
- point in time (wd:P585 as pq), also known as "as of", "at time", "by date", "date", "during", etc.:
  - date something took place, existed or a statement was true; for providing time use the "refine date" property (P4241)
output.answer: No restaurants with 3 Michelin stars in 2015 were found in Wikidata. This may be because the data isn't present in the knowledge graph or the property used for Michelin stars (P1344) isn't consistently populated with year qualifiers for this specific year and star rating.

No restaurants with 3 Michelin stars in 2015 were found in Wikidata. This may be because the data isn't present in the knowledge graph or the property used for Michelin stars (P1344) isn't consistently populated with year qualifiers for this specific year and star rating.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?restaurant ?country ?city ?chef WHERE {
  ?restaurant p:P1344 [ ps:P1344 "3" ; pq:P585 ?year ] .
  ?restaurant wdt:P17 ?country ; wdt:P131 ?city ; wdt:P176 ?chef .
  FILTER(SUBSTR(STR(?year) , 1 , 4) = "2015")
}
```

- country (wd:P17 as wdt), also known as "host country", "land", "sovereign state", "state":

- manufacturer (wd:P176 as wdt), also known as "assembled by", "assembler", "brewed by", "brewer", "builder", etc.:

  - "entity" index (type="fuzzy"): Entities indexed by their labels and synonyms

Index types used:
- "embedding": Retrieves items by cosine similarity between their embeddings and the query embedding. The embedding model used depends on the index and may support text, images, or both.
- "fuzzy": Retrieves items by overlap between their label words and the query keywords. The query keywords must not match label words exactly, but some fuzziness is allowed. The longer a query keyword is, the more it can deviate from a label word and still be considered a match, though it will also contribute less to the overall score.
